plaintext:
We are very pleased to announce that we now have an Instagram account! You can
find us at @particl.official or simply click here
[https://www.instagram.com/particl.official/] to view our feed. Instagram is a
social network that’s getting increasingly popular with crypto users and will
hopefully help us reach new people and push a different style of content. Follow
our page and #BePART [https://paper.dropbox.com/?q=%23BePART] of this journey
with us!

Don’t forget to also follow our other social media accounts on Facebook
[https://www.facebook.com/ParticlProject/], Twitter
[https://twitter.com/ParticlProject], and LinkedIn
[https://www.linkedin.com/company/particl/].
html:
We are very pleased to announce that we now have an Instagram account! You can find us at @particl.official or simply click here to view our feed. Instagram is a social network that’s getting increasingly popular with crypto users and will hopefully help us reach new people and push a different style of content. Follow our page and #BePART of this journey with us!

Don’t forget to also follow our other social media accounts on Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn.
